metadata.title: Remove hardcoded personal email default from pm-web source
metadata.description: Security/privacy fix: src/db.ts, src/routes/auth.ts, sql/schema.sql had stefan@preu.at as default for PM_WEB_BOOTSTRAP_ADMIN_EMAIL. Replaced with empty default; guard SQL to skip promotion when env var unset. README updated. Source-only fix per user instruction (no history rewrite).
metadata.author: codex

metadata.title: Release readiness hardening for pm-web
metadata.description: Prepare pm-web as a production-ready pm package with package-local pm tracking, generated changelog data, CI and daily release automation.
metadata.author: codex
metadata.acceptance_criteria: Package installs with pm install; npm release gate passes; changelog is generated from package-local pm data; tracked files and reachable git history have no secret pattern hits.

tasks/pm-web-srg8.toon.body: Implemented release-ready package metadata and automation for pm-web using the latest pm CLI 2026.5.24 and pm SDK contracts. Added local pm project tracking, CI/release workflows, pm-changelog integration, TypeScript checks, production audit gates, dry-run packaging, installability metadata, and registry metadata. Verified no private tokens or personal files are present in tracked files or reachable git history before release preparation.
